purpose: Record additional web-reviewed official or rights-reviewable source leads for the three runnable photoreal river environments without downloading third-party media or promoting any source to production use.

observed_useful_evidence: official South Fork recreation context
official access and put-in/take-out lead text
BLM-hosted photo leads requiring item-level metadata review
outfitter and permit-context review lead
reviewed_web_sources.next_action: Attach exact map/PDF metadata, public-use constraints, access geometry, and item-level photo credits before using the page for production routes or art reference.
reviewed_web_sources.promotion_gate: Use as source lead only until current access restrictions, map date, item rights, local guide/outfitter validation, and publication sensitivity review pass.

observed_useful_evidence: official map lead linked from the BLM South Fork page
route/access context candidate for editor annotation review
reviewed_web_sources.next_action: Record map date, cartographic credits, scale, coordinate assumptions, and allowable derivative use before digitizing or packaging any route/access geometry.
reviewed_web_sources.promotion_gate: Do not import geometry from the PDF until terms, attribution, current access status, and guide/local review are attached.

launch/take-out and trip-length review lead
official NPS image captions and credits requiring item-level review

reviewed_web_sources.promotion_gate: Use only as official context until exact route geometry, NPS item metadata, oarsman review, and public screenshot sensitivity review pass.

observed_useful_evidence: official digital photo archive lead
official public-domain b-roll lead

reviewed_web_sources.next_action: Review individual archive items for title, date, creator, license/public-domain status, credit line, location, and allowed use before any asset or texture reference promotion.
reviewed_web_sources.promotion_gate: No photo, video, or frame may become an asset input until item-level metadata, attribution, and route/publication sensitivity review are recorded.

GetCapabilities URL recorded on page

JASEC hydrometric stations candidate
DA_UNIDADES HIDROLOGICAS and ICE_CUENCAS HIDROGRAFICAS basin-layer candidates
reviewed_web_sources.next_action: Capture station IDs, variable names, coordinates, units, temporal coverage, basin relation, terms, and guide interpretation before numeric Pacuare flow or rainfall-linked feature tuning.
reviewed_web_sources.promotion_gate: Do not use these layers for gameplay flow bands or route geometry until attributes, terms, CRS, station relevance, and local guide/geospatial review pass.

manual_social_reference_followup.rule: Public social links may guide manual fidelity questions, but no photo, video, caption, comment, thumbnail, audio, or model-training use is allowed without explicit item-level rights and creator permission.

next_checkpoint: Promote exact official layers or item-level media references only after metadata, terms, attribution, guide review, and public-screenshot sensitivity are recorded.
